infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used to capture incident scene photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is used to geotag incident photos and auto-fill incident location.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library access allows you to attach existing photos to incidents.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow FirstResponders to access your camera.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow FirstResponders to access your location.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow FirstResponders to access your photos.
